page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m4.4xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs, operating at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz using an Intel Xeon processor. The system is configured with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include local NVMe or SSD storage, requiring network-attached storage for persistent data. It has no integrated GPU accelerators. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 10 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

With a 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance is designed for general-purpose workloads. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance without resource sharing. It is suitable for application servers, web serving, containerized microservices, and medium-sized databases that do not require high-speed local storage or GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m4.4xlarge is a general-purpose x86_64 server instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 16 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores and 16 vCPUs operating at 2.7 GHz, paired with 64.0 GB of system memory to maintain a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. The instance does not feature local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. With dedicated CPU allocation and no hyperthreading, it delivers predictable processing performance. This configuration is suitable for general-purpose workloads, including web serving, application hosting, containerized deployments, and standard database operations.

tagline: A balanced general-purpose server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors, 64 GB of RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth for consistent workloads.
